name: SMITH MIDLAND CORP
summary: Smith-Midland Corporation invents, develops, manufactures, markets, leases, licenses, sells, and installs precast concrete products through six wholly-owned subsidiaries. Key products include SlenderWall lightweight exterior wall panels, J-J Hooks Highway Safety Barrier, Sierra Wall sound barriers, Easi-Set and Easi-Span precast buildings, and SoftSound sound-absorptive finish. The company serves construction, highway, utilities, and farming industries, primarily in the Mid-Atlantic, Northeastern, Midwestern, and Southeastern United States, and licenses products internationally.
